title: Simple Lucky Block
description: Adds a Lucky Block to Minecraft with random lucky or unlucky drops.
body:
Simple Lucky Block: Adds a simple Lucky Block to Minecraft!

![Simple Lucky Block Header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7c4f21ad178e64b63f7ae4270853c169cec5b49f_0.webp)

Simple Lucky Block is an exciting mod that adds a Lucky Block to the game that brings an element of chance and surprise to your gameplay! When broken, the Lucky Block has a chance to drop various items, create explosions, or even spawn special effects.

World Generation
- Lucky Blocks generate naturally in any New World

Unlucky Drops
- Explosions
- Useless items (sticks, dead bushes, flint)
- And many more!

Normal Drops
- Complete sets of tools (Wooden, Stone, Gold)
- Armor sets (Leather, Gold, Iron)
- Special items like Sponges and Ender Chests
- Ender Pearls and Eyes of Ender
- Custom-named items
- And many more!

Very Lucky Drops
- Special effects and rare items
- Unique gameplay experiences

![Simple Lucky Block Demo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/VbKuf25K/images/fcf4c45322b50a0c687cc8767f714c2bceaf129b.gif)

Technical Details
- Compatible with Forge, Fabric, NeoForge, and Quilt
- Fabric version requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
- Quilt version may require [Quilted Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/qsl)
- Lightweight and performance-friendly
- Easy to install and use

How to Use
1. Craft or Find a Lucky Block
2. Break it to trigger random effects
3. Experience the excitement of not knowing what you'll get!

![Simple Lucky Block Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/db7e1a1fc80b04b24cd2b771d1b6cdb8f0b02f5d_0.webp)

License
- MIT License
- Feel free to use the mod however you like, as long as you give proper credit.
